---
title: "test_merge_traces_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_merge_traces_empire.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.25
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.11
---

## Intent
The `test_merge_traces_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_process_single_trace, test_process_single_trace_update, test_save_dataset_atomic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_process_single_trace, test_process_single_trace_update, test_save_dataset_atomic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.tools.merge_traces](file://src.tools.merge_traces)

### Exports
- `test_process_single_trace`
- `test_process_single_trace_update`
- `test_save_dataset_atomic`
